description: Powerball Personal Plugin Hooks — custom hooks for personal workflows, knowledge management, and development processes.

hooks.command: echo '{"additionalContext": "MANDATORY PreCompact Hook: You MUST invoke the kb skill RIGHT NOW before context is compacted. Do not skip this step. Use the Skill tool with skill=powerball-personal:kb (no argument) to auto-summarise and save the most significant insight or decision from this conversation to the knowledge base. This is non-optional."}'

bash -c 'if git rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then staged=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null); unstaged=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$staged" ] && [ -n "$unstaged" ]; then echo "⚠️  You have both staged and unstaged changes. Consider staging everything or committing before continuing."; fi; fi'
